content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach consistently chose moves matched to live reads and timed them well. Turn 2 goes under the story to sensation/feeling rather than offering scripts. Turn 4 catches the linguistic caveat ('I don't know if that's a fair thing to even say') and reflects it back — a textbook AoA move. Turn 6 and 8 invite the client to stay with the cost and the tiredness without rushing to action, holding feeling before want. Turn 8 specifically names the hedge ('without any of the but-she's-not-a-villain attached') — empathizing with the constricted self-permission. Turn 10 stays minimal when the client is already opening, letting silence work. Turn 12 names the old instruction ('the strong one is a job description') — applying view to the voice — and only then asks the deeper identity question. Turn 14 lands the meta-move ('the words were never the problem') at exactly the moment the client surfaces that the real concern is bigger. Sequence is intact: feeling → want → fear-under-want → identity. The coach never gives scripts, never ultimatum-frames, never validates sister-as-villain. One small miss: the love test / 'what if you acted exactly how you want' has not yet appeared, but the arc is still mid-flight and the groundwork is well-laid.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Goes under the story into the felt sense rather than answering the 'how' question — refuses to give scripts."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Catches the linguistic caveat ('unfair to say') and reflects it back — a precise AoA read-to-move match."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names that it sounds strange, invites client to stay with it, asks what it costs — feeling/cost before action."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicitly invites the tiredness to be there without the 'but she's not a villain' hedge — empathizes with the constricted boundary."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Holds silence/minimal prompt at the right moment, letting the client supply 'cold, selfish.' Doesn't reassure."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Applies view to the voice — names 'the strong one' as an old instruction/job description. Reframes without prescribing."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names that 'the words were never the problem' at the precise moment client realizes the same. Stays with what just happened rather than chasing the new content."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary", "view"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["does-saying-it-increase-your-love", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "empowered-vs-power"],
  "notes": "Conversation appears mid-arc; the love test and want/action moves may still be coming. Scoring on what's present, which is strong."
}
